name: whispr
description: Local privacy guard for AI agent prompts and messages. Detects and redacts secrets (seed phrases, private keys, API keys, wallet addresses) and emits a verifiable privacy-receipt. Self-contained core (no network calls); optional opt-in adapter forwards redacted prompts. MIT.

scripts.test: node --test tests/scan.test.js tests/redact.test.js tests/receipt.test.js tests/adapter.test.js tests/detectors.test.js tests/bench.test.js tests/sign.test.js tests/credential.test.js
